mapper.sql: SELECT w.id, w.waitlist_no, w.user_id, w.flight_id, f.flight_no, w.cabin_class, w.passenger_count, w.pay_amount, w.status, w.expire_time, w.paid_at, w.ticket_order_id, w.refund_amount, w.refund_time, w.last_skip_reason, w.created_at FROM waitlist_order w JOIN flight f ON w.flight_id = f.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO waitlist_order(waitlist_no, user_id, flight_id, passenger_count, cabin_class, pay_amount, status, expire_time) VALUES(#{waitlistNo}, #{userId}, #{flightId}, #{passengerCount}, #{cabinClass}, #{payAmount}, #{status}, #{expireTime})

INSERT INTO waitlist_passenger(waitlist_id, passenger_id, passenger_name, passenger_type) VALUES
(#{wp.waitlistId}, #{wp.passengerId}, #{wp.passengerName}, #{wp.passengerType})
mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.waitlist_no, w.user_id, w.flight_id, f.flight_no, w.cabin_class, w.passenger_count, w.pay_amount, w.status, w.expire_time, w.paid_at, w.ticket_order_id, w.refund_amount, w.refund_time, w.last_skip_reason, w.created_at, wp.passenger_id AS wp_passenger_id, wp.passenger_name AS wp_passenger_name, wp.passenger_type AS wp_passenger_type, wp.locked_seat_id AS wp_seat_id, wp.locked_seat_no AS wp_seat_no FROM waitlist_order w JOIN flight f ON w.flight_id = f.id LEFT JOIN waitlist_passenger wp ON w.id = wp.waitlist_id WHERE w.id = #{id}

SELECT w.id, w.waitlist_no, w.user_id, w.flight_id, f.flight_no, w.cabin_class, w.passenger_count, w.pay_amount, w.status, w.expire_time, w.paid_at, w.ticket_order_id, w.refund_amount, w.refund_time, w.last_skip_reason, w.created_at, wp.passenger_id AS wp_passenger_id, wp.passenger_name AS wp_passenger_name, wp.passenger_type AS wp_passenger_type, wp.locked_seat_id AS wp_seat_id, wp.locked_seat_no AS wp_seat_no FROM waitlist_order w JOIN flight f ON w.flight_id = f.id LEFT JOIN waitlist_passenger wp ON w.id = wp.waitlist_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE waitlist_order SET status = #{newStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
UPDATE waitlist_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE waitlist_order SET paid_at = #{paidAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE waitlist_order SET ticket_order_id = #{ticketOrderId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE waitlist_order SET last_skip_reason = #{reason} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, waitlist_no, user_id, flight_id, passenger_count, cabin_class, pay_amount, status, expire_time, paid_at, created_at, updated_at FROM waitlist_order WHERE status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND expire_time < NOW()

SELECT w.id, w.waitlist_no, w.user_id, w.flight_id, w.passenger_count, w.cabin_class, w.pay_amount, w.status, w.expire_time, w.paid_at, w.refund_amount, w.refund_time, w.created_at, w.updated_at FROM waitlist_order w JOIN flight f ON w.flight_id = f.id WHERE w.status = 'WAITING' AND (f.departure_time <= NOW() OR f.publish_status != 'PUBLISHED' OR f.status NOT IN ('ON_TIME', 'DELAYED'))
